code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    if not triples:
        return ""
    # Use the subject of the first triple as the main entity
    main_subject = triples[0].subject

    # Helper to turn a predicate/object pair into a readable clause
    def clause(pred: str, obj: str) -> str:
        pred = pred.strip()
        obj = obj.strip()
        # Mapping of predicates to natural language templates
        templates = {
            "cityServed": lambda o: f"serves the city {o}",
            "location": lambda o: f"is located in {o}",
            "country": lambda o: f"is situated in {o}",
            "isPartOf": lambda o: f"is part of {o}",
            "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": lambda o: f"is at an elevation of {o} metres above sea level",
            "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": lambda o: f"is at an elevation of {o} feet above sea level",
            "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": lambda o: f"is at an elevation of {o} metres above sea level",
            "runwayLength": lambda o: f"has a runway length of {o} metres",
            "runwayName": lambda o: f"has runway {o}",
            "runwaySurfaceType": lambda o: f"has a runway surface of {o}",
            "operatingOrganisation": lambda o: f"is operated by {o}",
            "owner": lambda o: f"is owned by {o}",
            "icaoLocationIdentifier": lambda o: f"has ICAO identifier {o}",
            "locationIdentifier": lambda o: f"has location identifier {o}",
            "iataLocationIdentifier": lambda o: f"has IATA code {o}",
            "nativeName": lambda o: f"is natively known as {o}",
            "leader": lambda o: f"is led by {o}",
            "leaderParty": lambda o: f"belongs to the party {o}",
            "capital": lambda o: f"has capital {o}",
            "language": lambda o: f"speaks {o}",
            "officialLanguage": lambda o: f"has official language {o}",
            "largestCity": lambda o: f"has largest city {o}",
            "countySeat": lambda o: f"has county seat {o}",
            "mayor": lambda o: f"has mayor {o}",
            "chief": lambda o: f"is headed by {o}",
            "foundingYear": lambda o: f"was founded in {o}",
            "postalCode": lambda o: f"has postal code {o}",
            "areaCode": lambda o: f"has area code {o}",
            "regionServed": lambda o: f"serves the region {o}",
            "hubAirport": lambda o: f"uses {o} as a hub airport",
            "aircraftHelicopter": lambda o: f"operates helicopter {o}",
            "transportAircraft": lambda o: f"operates transport aircraft {o}",
            "aircraftFighter": lambda o: f"operates fighter aircraft {o}",
            "attackAircraft": lambda o: f"operates attack aircraft {o}",
            "battle": lambda o: f"participated in the battle {o}",
            "currency": lambda o: f"uses the currency {o}",
            "headquarter": lambda o: f"has headquarters at {o}",
            "jurisdiction": lambda o: f"is under the jurisdiction of {o}",
            "demonym": lambda o: f"its demonym is {o}",
            "class": lambda o: f"is classified as {o}",
            "division": lambda o: f"belongs to the division {o}",
            "order": lambda o: f"is in the order {o}",
            "administrativeArrondissement": lambda o: f"is part of the arrondissement {o}",
            "leaderTitle": lambda o: f"has leader title {o}",
            "founder": lambda o: f"was founded by {o}",
            "foundedBy": lambda o: f"was founded by {o}",
        }
        # Direct lookup
        if pred in templates:
            return templates[pred](obj)
        # Generic handling for identifiers
        if pred.endswith("Identifier"):
            return f"has identifier {obj}"
        # Generic handling for runway numbers and lengths with ordering
        if "RunwayLength" in pred:
            unit = "feet" if "Feet" in pred else "metres"
            return f"has a runway length of {obj} {unit}"
        if "RunwayNumber" in pred:
            return f"has runway number {obj}"
        if "RunwaySurfaceType" in pred:
            return f"has runway surface type {obj}"
        # Fallback generic phrasing
        return f"{pred.replace('_', ' ')} {obj}"

    # Build clauses for all triples
    clauses = [clause(t.predicate, t.object) for t in triples]

    # Combine clauses into a single fluent sentence
    if len(clauses) == 1:
        sentence = f"{main_subject} {clauses[0]}."
    else:
        # commas between all but the last clause, with an Oxford comma
        sentence = f"{main_subject} " + ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + f", and {clauses[-1]}."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
